tSideState(side,{status,progress:1,error:'',warnings:extraction.rejected?.length?[`${extraction.rejected.length} malformed scanner fragment${extraction.rejected.length===1?' was':'s were'} ignored.`]:[]})}catch(error){console.error('[Runyan Garden] packet extraction failure',{side,kind:error?.kind,error});const message=error?.kind==='timeout'?'Packet reading took too long. Keep the photo, retake it, or enter the details manually.':error?.kind==='unreadable'?'The photo was saved, but the text was not clear enough to prefill details. Retake it or continue manually.':'The packet reader could not process this photo. The photo and form are still available.';setSideState(side,{status:(draft.brand||draft.name||draft.variety)?'Exact product lookup needed':'Could not read this photo',progress:0,error:message})}};
- const selectPhoto=async(side,file)=>{const validation=validatePacketImage(file);if(!validation.ok){setSideState(side,{status:'Could not read this photo',error:validation.message});return}setSideState(side,{status:'Processing photo',progress:0,error:'',warnings:[]});try{const compressed=await compressPacketImage(file);setPhotoFor(side,compressed.dataUrl);setImageMeta(current=>({...current,[side]:{width:compressed.width,height:compressed.height,originalBytes:compressed.originalBytes,compressedBytes:compressed.compressedBytes,mimeType:compressed.mimeType}}));setSideState(side,{status:'Photo ready',progress:0,error:'',warnings:compressed.qualityWarnings});await processPhoto(side,compressed.dataUrl)}catch(error){console.error('[Runyan Garden] packet image processing failure',{side,error});setSideState(side,{status:'Could not read this photo',error:error?.message||'The photo could not be prepared. Retake it or enter the packet manually.'})}};
- const rotateSide=async side=>{const photo=photoFor(side);if(!photo)return;try{const rotated=await rotatePacketImage(photo);setPhotoFor(side,rotated);setSideState(side,{status:'Photo ready',error:''});await processPhoto(side,rotated,true)}catch(error){console.error('[Runyan Garden] packet rotation failure',{side,error});setSideState(side,{error:'The photo could not be rotated. The original is still available.'})}};
+ const selectPhoto=async(side,file)=>{const validation=validatePacketImage(file);if(!validation.ok){setSideState(side,{status:'Photo unavailable',error:validation.message});return}setSideState(side,{status:'Preparing packet photo',progress:0,error:'',warnings:[]});try{const compressed=await compressPacketImage(file,{maxDimension:2400,quality:.88});setPhotoFor(side,compressed.dataUrl);setImageMeta(current=>({...current,[side]:{width:compressed.width,height:compressed.height,originalBytes:compressed.originalBytes,compressedBytes:compressed.compressedBytes,mimeType:compressed.mimeType}}));setSideState(side,{status:'Photo ready',progress:1,error:'',warnings:compressed.qualityWarnings});setVisionState(current=>({...current,status:'stale',message:'Photos ready for analysis.'}))}catch(error){console.error('[Runyan Garden] packet image preparation failure',{side,error});setSideState(side,{status:'Photo unavailable',error:'The photo could not be prepared. Your current draft is still saved.'})}};
+ const analyzePhotos=async()=>{if(!frontPhoto||!backPhoto||visionState.status==='analyzing')return;setVisionState(current=>({...current,status:'analyzing',message:'Analyzing front and back together…'}));setPhotoState(current=>({front:{...current.front,status:'Analyzing packet'},back:{...current.back,status:'Analyzing packet'}}));try{const result=await analyzePacketPhotos({frontImage:frontPhoto,backImage:backPhoto,draftContext:{brand:draft.brand,name:draft.name,variety:draft.variety,manualFields:Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(draft.fieldMeta||{}).filter(([,m])=>m?.source==='manual'||m?.manuallyCorrected).map(([k])=>[k,draft[k]]))}});const merged=mergeVisionPacketResult(draft,result);setDraft(merged.draft);setVisionState({status:'ready',message:merged.optionalMissing.length?'Packet identified; a few optional details need review.':'Packet details ready.',requestId:result.requestId,configured:true});setPhotoState(current=>({front:{...current.front,status:'Packet analyzed',error:''},back:{...current.back,status:'Packet analyzed',error:''}}));setTimeout(()=>reviewSection.current?.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'start'}),60)}catch(error){console.error('[Runyan Garden] multimodal packet analysis failed',{code:error.code,requestId:error.requestId});setVisionState(current=>({...current,status:'error',message:error.message||'Packet analysis could not finish.',requestId:error.requestId||''}));setPhotoState(current=>({front:{...current.front,status:'Photos saved'},back:{...current.back,status:'Photos saved'}}))}};
+ const rotateSide=async side=>{const photo=photoFor(side);if(!photo)return;try{const rotated=await rotatePacketImage(photo);setPhotoFor(side,rotated);setSideState(side,{status:'Photo ready',error:''});setVisionState(current=>({...current,status:'stale',message:'Photo changed. Analyze the updated photos.'}))}catch(error){console.error('[Runyan Garden] packet rotation failure',{side,error});setSideState(side,{error:'The photo could not be rotated. The original is still available.'})}};
  const removeSide=side=>{setPhotoFor(side,'');setImageMeta(current=>({...current,[side]:null}));setSideState(side,{status:'Photo ready',progress:0,error:'',warnings:[]})};
 
  const resumeDraft=()=>{setDraft(emptyPacketDraft(recovery.draft||{}));setFrontPhoto(recovery.frontPhoto||'');setBackPhoto(recovery.backPhoto||'');setImageMeta(recovery.imageMeta||{front:null,back:null});setPhotoState(recovery.photoState||photoState);setRecovery(null);setSavedPacket(null)};
@@ -65,5 +70,5 @@
 
  const submitPacket=async event=>{event.preventDefault();if(saveAttempt.current||saving)return;const name=String(draft.name||'').trim();if(!name){setSaveError('Enter or confirm the crop name before saving.');document.getElementById('packet-name')?.focus();return}if(duplicate&&!allowSeparate){setSaveError('A possible matching packet is already saved. Choose an option in the duplicate warning before saving.');return}saveAttempt.current=true;setSaving(true);setSaveError('');try{const payload=packetPayload({...draft,cropId:inferCropId(draft)},{frontPhoto,backPhoto,imageMeta});payload.cropId=inferCropId(payload);payload.reservedQuantity=Math.min(payload.quantity,Math.max(0,payload.reservedQuantity||0));const result=await Promise.resolve(savePacket(payload));if(result?.ok===false){setSaveError(result.message||'The packet could not be saved. Your draft and photos are still here.');return}const packet=result?.packet||payload;clearPacketDraft();setSavedPacket(packet);setDraft(emptyPacketDraft());setFrontPhoto('');setBackPhoto('');setImageMeta({front:null,back:null});setAllowSeparate(false);setTimeout(()=>savedSection.current?.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'start'}),50)}catch(error){console.error('[Runyan Garden] packet save failure',{error});setSaveError('The packet could not be saved. Your form and photos are still here. Retry or continue editing.')}finally{setSaving(false);saveAttempt.current=false}};
 
- return <main className="screen secondary-screen seed-tools-screen"><SecondaryHero icon={Sprout} eyebrow="RUNYAN GARDEN CENTER" title="Seed Department" description="Photograph the packet, review what was read, and save exact packet-specific guidance." onBack={()=>navigate('center')} backLabel="Back to Garden Center" className="center-department-hero seed-tools-header"/><section className="seed-tools-body screen-pad secondary-screen-content">{recovery&&<section className="seed-draft-recovery" role="status"><RefreshCw/><span><strong>Resume seed packet?</strong><small>A temporary draft from this session includes your form entries or packet photos.</small></span><div><button className="primary-button" onClick={resumeDraft}>Resume seed packet</button><button onClick={discardRecovery}>Discard draft</button></div></section>}{draft.sourceShoppingItemId&&<section className="seed-shopping-handoff"><PackageSearch/><span><strong>Adding a purchased shopping-list item</strong><small>Enter only packet details that can be confirmed. Extracted values remain reviewable.</small></span></section>}<section className="capture-explainer"><ImagePlus/><span><strong>Photos do the first pass.</strong><small>The front usually identifies the packet. The back usually supplies planting instructions. Manual entry always remains available.</small></span></section><form className="packet-capture-form phase-45-packet-form" onSubmit={submitPacket} noValidate><section className="packet-photo-grid"><PhotoPanel side="front" photo={frontPhoto} {...photoState.front} onSelect={file=>selectPhoto('front',file)} onRotate={()=>rotateSide('front')} onRemove={()=>removeSide('front')} onRead={()=>processPhoto('front',frontPhoto,true)}/><PhotoPanel side="back" photo={backPhoto} {...photoState.back} onSelect={file=>selectPhoto('back',file)} onRotate={()=>rotateSide('back')} onRemove={()=>removeSide('back')} onRead={()=>processPhoto('back',backPhoto,true)}/></section><div ref={reviewSection}><ReviewSummary draft={draft} onChange={updateField}/></div><OnlineLookupPanel draft={draft} lookup={lookup} onChoose={chooseOnlineProduct} onRetry={retryLookup} onResolve={resolveConflict} onChangeMatch={changeOnlineProduct}/>{duplicate&&<section className="packet-duplicate-warning" role="alert"><AlertTriangle/><span><strong>Possible matching packet found</strong><small>{duplicate.packet.name}{duplicate.packet.variety?` — ${duplicate.packet.variety}`:''} · {duplicate.reasons.join(', ')}</small></span><div><button type="button" onClick={openDuplicate}>Open existing packet</button>{onAddPacketQuantity&&<button type="button" onClick={addDuplicateQuantity}>Add quantity to existing</button>}<button type="button" onClick={()=>setAllowSeparate(true)}>Save as separate packet</button><button type="button" onClick={()=>setSaveError('')}>Continue editing</button></div></section>}<d
